agents.prompt: Read the module under src/ and identify code smells: long functions (>50 lines), deep nesting (>3 levels), duplicate code, god objects, feature envy, primitive obsession, magic numbers, long parameter lists
For each smell, propose a refactor pattern: extract method/class, replace conditional with polymorphism, replace magic numbers with named constants, introduce parameter object, etc.
For each proposed refactor, assess the risk (low / medium / high) based on: scope of change, test coverage, public API impact, and how reversible it is. Prefer low-risk refactors
Apply the low-risk refactors from the risk assessment, one at a time, with a clear commit message. Keep the public API unchanged
